Spalletti: Inter need more signings

Luciano Spalletti insists Inter need to make further signings before the transfer window closes following their loss to Chelsea.

Inter went down 5-4 on penalties against Chelsea after Saturday's International Champions Cup clash ended 1-1 in Nice.

The Serie A side have been busy in the transfer market, signing Radja Nainggolan, Lautaro Martinez, Stefan de Vrij, Kwadwo Asamoah and Matteo Politano.

However, Inter head coach Spalletti said the Scudetto hopefuls – who are reportedly closing in on Atletico Madrid and Croatia full-back Sime Vrsaljko – need more recruits to challenge reigning champions Juventus.

"Transfers? We don't have many spare parts right now," Spalletti said. "I'd like to make it known that we've played a lot with the same players, without those who are injured and have been with their national teams."

Spalletti added: "It's the speed ​​in implementing quality that makes the difference. Vrsaljko? There are no problems, the club have a plan in mind and we have to wait.

"It seems clear to me that the market isn't over yet. Whoever finishes top of our league has two teams for when you go to play in the cups, which take away your energy, or after two or three days, when you have to change six players.

"Then there are injuries. We need another goalkeeper, Icardi's deputy… That's how it goes, so we're working towards it and we're close to completing our squad."

咁講 咪要簽好多人

replies.msg:
Inter legend Beppe Bergomi is impressed by new signing Kwadwo Asamoah.

The former Juventus midfielder impressed in the friendly against Chelsea.

"He has great personality and individual technique," Bergomi said on Sky Italia.

“He knows how to protect the ball too and the play starts with him. He was a surprise even for me, in a role he hasn't played for some time now."

Asamoah joined Inter on a free transfer.

If Inter hope to have Vrsaljko soon, Atletico Madrid are in no hurry to sell and would not even mind to continue with him as confirmed by their coach, Diego Simeone, to the Spanish media.

“We are very happy with Sime, he had an excellent World Cup, showing his ability even in the offensive phase of the game. He was decisive. We are waiting for him on August 6th and I hope he can continue with us because he is an important player.”

Tottenham open discussions for Geoffrey Kondogbia

Premier League side Tottenham have opened discussions with French midfielder Geoffrey Kondogbia, who was recently bought by Valencia after a successful loan spell from Inter Milan, according to France Football.

The outlet claims that there are a number of teams willing to activate Kondogbia’s release clause, but that Tottenham are currently the most forceful.

Rafinha Reiterates He Would Of Liked To Have Stayed At Inter

Speaking at a press conference before Barcelona’s friendly match against Roma, Rafinha answered questions about his future: “If I knew, I would tell you. There have been many stories [in reference to his latest link with Lazio], which is why I let my agents do the work. I spent five great months at Inter and I would of liked to continue there but I am a Barcelona player.”

Links with Inter have greatly dimished since Ausilio’s blitz signings of Vrsaljko and Vidal, but many fans will still feel as if there are weak spots in the team that Rafinha could and deserves to fill, but Barcelona have not given any leeway in a second loan operation.

He then continued: “Every player wants to play in games, I do not know if I will get that chance here or elsewhere, but I want to play. For now, I will continue my preparation, while those I trust deal with my professional future.”

It seems extremely unlikely that Inter will return for the Brazilian if Barcelona continue to hold out for cash or potentially decide to keep him, as a result of his great form. Furthermore, recent news suggests the next target after Vidal will be Nicolo Barella.

佢踢法好直接，幾鍾意帶波，有時會見佢自己長驅直進帶波衝入對面禁區。而且佢幾勤力，會幫到隊波搶返控球權，世界盃有場佢係奪回球員次數最多既球員，唔記得左係幾多

捕後上時機係值得欣賞既地方，有時你唔會估到點解佢會出現喺禁區位置入波，同埋頭槌唔錯，中場中頂入到兩球關鍵波。

唔係好知沙里點踢，印象中都係保持球權同快速推進，都岩嘅，但成日好簡單傳送都傳失，防守企位失誤搞到中場成日比人打穿，有呢啲問題就好難做到頂級球員

After completing the signing of Sime Vrsaljko for the flank, Inter are now concentrated on a new priority for the transfer market: a midfielder. The dream target on the club's wish list is Real Madrid's Luka Modric. Modric was among the best performing players at this year's World Cup, and is one of the best in the world in the midfield. The operation would be a complicated one, without a doubt, but Inter intend to make a serious effort until the close of the transfer window.

There have already been initial contacts made with Modric's agents, ever slightly widening the narrow possibility that the transfer materializes. The fact that Inter will now field three of Modric's Croatian countrymen, with Vrsaljko, Brozovic, and Perisic, is also a point to consider. At the World Cup in fact, the players discussed their experiences with their clubs.

In Inter's pursuit for Vidal, they have not yet pushed for a final completion to the agreement, especially as they believe that they can obtain him from Bayern on more favorable terms, €18/19 million for a loan with purchase option.

After initial talks with Modric's agents have led to a glimmer of optimism for Inter successfully pulling off a major addition to the squad, the nerazzurri are preparing to make an attempt to open up concrete negotiations to move a deal forward. In the next few hours or days, it should become clear whether the deal is only a fantasy, and Inter would proceed to close the deal for Vidal.

想問下有冇暫時轉會資料既整合

轉會情報：維度、摩迪

國米簽入維沙高解決右閘缺人情況之後，國米將注意力集中於中場。目前有兩個目標：維度、摩迪。

維度：國米同拜仁已經達成一致協訂，得到史巴列堤同意，而且球員亦都接受是次轉會，交易會係以外借一年，再以18-20m 歐元買斷權操作，年薪4.5m簽3年約。

但係當國米發現簽入摩迪嘅可能性，就將維度嘅交易暫起Hold住，研究可唔可以兩個都簽晒。而部份媒體表示兩單交易並不排斥。維度已經準備就緒可以隨時飛去意大利。

摩迪：據Sky Sport消息，呢單交易醞釀咗成個月，國米一直秘密聯繫摩迪嘅經理人。而因為知道有「Mr.X」存在，轉會專家迪馬濟奧一直都唔提維度，直至摩迪呢個名字出現先至一併提出。據指，摩迪對於轉會國米持開放態度，因為佢已經喺皇馬贏得一切。放完假後（今個星期）佢將會返回西班牙同佩雷斯傾吓轉會嘅可能性。

呢單交易取決於球員同佩雷斯嘅取態，喺皇馬買人從來都唔易，所以要睇下佢地傾成點，國米球迷亦都唔好覺得呢單交易好樂觀，所有野都係未知之數。

以上係來自意大利Sky Sport、迪馬濟奧嘅資訊，其他果D垃圾報我就唔提了。

-然後後備，JM回家，Eder變LM，其他不變👌🏻

-基本上一出一入，兵源無增加👎🏻

Despite the comments made by Florentino Perez regarding the unlikeliness of a departure for star midfielder Luka Modric to Inter, the sides are still in a waiting game to see the outcome of a meeting between Modric and the Real Madrid boss. This Sunday, Modric is set to return to Madrid after his holidays, and could soon thereafter meet with Perez face-to-face.

Agent Vlado Lemic, and Guiseppe Riso, the same intermediary who helped successfully negotiate the Vrsaljko transfer to Inter, are still in Milan, holding lines of communications between Inter and Modric open.

The relationship between Modric and Real Madrid is warm, and a gentleman's agreement between the midfielder and Florentino Perez might be the solution to letting Modric leave, if that is what he decides to request. But a positive outcome of a meeting between the two is not assured, especially given Perez' revelation of a €750 million release clause in the player's contract.

Inter remain hopeful, but the next stages of the deal remain still play out

Inter are evaluating their squad ahead of next season, planning their next move on a transfer market where the club has already spent for several new players. Matteo Darmian is the subject of new contacts by Inter, the nerazzurri have contacted the Man United player's agents, as Inter look to possibly add another fullback. Versatile new addition Kwadwo Asamoah could find a role in the club's midfield, leaving a spot in defense open for a player of Darmian's profile. The fullback is being pursued by both Inter and Napoli, as a potential future away from Manchester awaits him.

第一，我無講到個轉會係失敗，我已經逐個位置講晒我點睇，如果我覺得係失敗既就唔會有讚有彈啦。可能你無乜留意我平時講咩啦，呢啲野我唔係今日先講，只係依加總結返。

第二，Hold維度有無問題呢啲邊到我諗啊師兄？我係就幾分事實說幾分話，啲新聞話國米有兩手準備，摩迪撻Q可以隨時要維度，呢個係我僅有資訊，你作為球迷又唔知內情，覺得高興係咪正常？
咁好啦，依加無啦啦維度比人截劫左，然後摩迪又話要750m，咁呢樣係我僅有既資訊，咁我質疑點解會兩個都無晒，咁又有咩問題？係架，有巴打提過遲早維度比人搶走，我唔評論係因為我會等佢發生左先至講。

話說回頭，我失望嘅主要係位換位嘅買賣無重要提升。當然你可以話國米唔會有一線嚟，我知架，我都話國米唔好當自己係咩新鮮羅白皮諗住洗大錢買球星。口裡說不，咁你當我戇鳩囉，日日喺到捕住個twitter等奇蹟，係得我信國米會買返件有質素。
到到傳Malcom、傳Vidal，以至依加嘅Modric，每一個我都信國米有做野。你地唔會失望，可能係你地覺得國米唔配，但有返少少期望都有問題？大佬，我地等左幾撚多年啊，你自己都知啦。

單獨睇真係好好J，每個都唔差，但當你放埋一齊同上年比，又真係唔多對路，有啲核心問題硬係解決唔到，我真係好擔心個中場中位置同埋前場技術不足呢兩個核心問題。

粒粒皆星四大皆空到拎歐聯個時有咩未見過
我唔知呢個帖大部分人係拎完歐聯先做球迷定點
見你地一兩條友好似p44 一場半場狀態唔好，
又屌到有價要賣又剩，
人地格仔入到決賽即刻轉撚曬風咁
你話廢撚到jm 鳩斬華咁就一定要賣

replies.msg:
逐句覆
又唔洗講自己幾時睇波嘅，唔會增加說服力，就算今年先開始睇都唔代表啲咩
P44呢，我自己就堅決唔想國米賣，又唔好塞啲說話入我個口到，我可以轉頭搵返我對P44嘅評價過你睇。
JM廢係事實，賣唔出我都無屌鳩過國米，由始至終我都係覺得係JM問題大過國米。而C87，賣得出咪賣，賣唔出我都是但。
買人多就收貨，咁上面提果兩個問題解決咗未？
光頭佬的確係唔想買攻中，因為佢要用尼恩高蘭打攻中，你話無人肯嚟，咁係咪乜都唔做？哥仔，入返歐聯，唔係打算咁樣開季吓嘛？是但執件二線技術型都好，解決攻中個問題，然後防中呢個位置搵返個好過vecino g5既我諗應該唔難。雖然口裡說不，巴卡藥膏嚟嘅話我諗我都會是但搵d優點嚟J

雖然你講緊啲野大部分都好似唔係講我，但我都想講吓自己一路以嚟嘅諗法。好多時候巴打們講嘅野我都唔同意，特別係講到P44、C87、漢丹、高華錫嘅時候，有時我都會反駁，而我係樂見呢種情況，我最唔想就係連討論區都搞到一言堂得一種意見。因此我通常都唔會起鋼，除非係太刺激，對上一次咁刺激已經係賣高華錫 所以你都無謂咁激動，搬晒自己幾時睇波出嚟講到好似說教咁。

點解有咗球迷會，好多球迷都可以聚埋一齊傾波嘅時候，我都仲要堅持喺呢到討論，就係因為希望有更多唔同嘅意見出現，大家可以隨時入嚟睇同傾，無人會迫你接受某一種論點，而我相信討論區留言板形式比起群組更加做到呢一點，更加易入口。已經無咗uwants，facebook又少人傾，大家可以鳩up傾波，而唔係圍爐嘅地方真係好少。

正

迪馬濟奧表示摩迪想離開皇馬，並會與佩雷斯單獨見面討論前程。

摩迪早於世界盃前、牙朗離隊前已經萌生去意，而且與佩雷斯有君子協訂，假如佢為皇馬贏得第三次歐冠就會放行，比佢尋找新挑戰。近日摩迪經理人Giuseppe Riso頻頻被拍攝於在米蘭與國米代表見面，國米亦清楚如何滿足球員需要，如今交易唯一陣礙係佩雷斯，而唔係金錢。

早前佩雷斯公開表示摩迪售價7.5億歐元，天文數字嘅意思係皇馬有打算留住摩迪，但如果摩迪堅持要走，佩雷斯亦會遵守協議放行，國米就可以進入談判。

星期日摩迪會結束假期歸隊，並於下星期與佩雷斯商討前途問題。預料佩雷斯會嘗試說服摩迪留隊，但如果摩迪堅持離隊，國米就會展開收購行動。

目前國米仍然等待呢次會結局果，究竟簽嘅係Mr.X Y Z，就睇呢次會面結果，所以接下來轉會的事並不掌握於國米手中。

（Di Marzio）

亦有意媒表示，呢次會議將於8月8日進行。

Inter Milan could move for Manchester City midfielder Ilkay Gundogan if they fail to lure Luka Modric away from Real Madrid, according to reports in Italy.

Inter want to secure Modric’s services but with Madrid reluctant to part with the Croatia international, they have been forced to explore alternative targets.

Tuttosport claim they are interested in Gundogan, with City reportedly willing to let the Germany midfielder leave for around €40m.

The days of truth are arriving for the future of centrocampista Luka Modric.

The Croatian international - Inter's transfer market dream -, in all likelihood, will meet Real Madrid president Florentino Perez some time between Wednesday and Thursday. It will be a face-to-face meeting surrounding the intentions of the Croatian midfielder who, to date, is still convinced by the possibility for a new challenge after many years of success with Real Madrid in Spain.

Mdric was on holiday in Sardegna over the past few days: from the player's requests and from the reaction of Perez, we are likely to start to understand a lot about the future of Modric with Inter remaining in confident about the possible transfer. With the Nerazzurri ready, in the case of a break between the Croatian and Real, they are preparing to try to bring the player to Italy to join his Croatian teammates Brozovic, Perisic, and new arrival Vrsaljko.

Inter have made a major step in the right direction in the Luka Modric case: the Croatian wants to move to Inter, Fabrizio Romano can exclusively reveal for Calciomercato.com.

The 32-year-old has already agreed to the wages that the Nerazzurri have offered him, and is also convinced of his role within the Nerazzurri’s plans for the future under Luciano Spalletti.

​Trouble is, the Croatian - who reached the World Cup final with his country in Russia, only to lose to France 4-2 - knows that Florentino Perez will be hard to overcome.

The Real president is rightly being obdurate about the man who helped him win four Champions League titles in five years.

Modric wants to talk to his president, and it appears that this will happen on Wednesday. He knows this will have to be greenlighted by the Real supremo, who has already lost Zinedine Zidane and Cristiano Ronaldo this summer.

But the detail here is that Inter already have everything ready in case Florentino were to concede….

Everything revolves around the meeting with Florentino Perez. This is always the point around which Inter's dream revolves to bring the Croatian into the Nerazzurri.

It is all in the hands of Modric who will have to free himself from the club in face to face with the president of Real Madrid.

The player will 'claim' the gentleman agreement with Perez; Inter had reassurance on this and if Florentino maintained this commitment taken long ago with the midfielder, Modric will start a new adventure away from Madrid.

It will be worth seeing then what will be the first answer from Perez, then the Inter can proceed (between commissions and with the agreement on the contract that already exists), trusting together with the agents of the player in favorable conditions of exit (as promised in case he had asked to leave).

A decisive meeting, therefore, between the will of the player and the gentleman agreement to be asserted: now everything is in Florentino, if it intends to keep that promise or not.

Di Marzio

replies.msg:
The relationship between Real Madrid President Florentino Perez and Croatian midfielder Luka Modric is looking to be at breaking point after Spanish media outlet LaSextaDeportes reports that the meeting between the parties has been unilaterally cancelled by the Los Merengues boss.

According to the report, Perez has with one nights notice decided not to meet neither the player’s representatives nor the player himself. By doing this the Madrid boss thinks he has concluded the questions concerning the player’s future as he expects Modric to rejoin the squad tomorrow at the club’s training ground in Valdebebas ahead of the European Supercup fixture.

The Spanish newspaper concludes that by doing this Florentino Perez has shut the door firmly in Inter’s face and that the transfer is officially over. However, this could land very poorly with Modric himself who could now personally explicitly ask for a transfer causing a complete relationship breakdown between him and the club.

Modric returns to Valdebebas: agents present in Madrid, waiting for Perez

The wait is growing ahead of the meeting between Modric and Florentino Perez.

Meanwhile, the Croatian midfielder is back today to train in Valdebebas with Varane, Marcelo, Casemiro and Kovacic (only gym for the latter, promised to Chelsea).

In the picture above, here is the moment when Modric left the sports center of Real Madrid in the car from a secondary exit.

The Croatian was the last to leave, around 13.50, an hour after the rest of the comrades from the World Cup; the rest of the pink 'Blanca' instead will return this afternoon from the tour in the States.

The return of Florentino is therefore expected, which will arrive in Spain later than the team.

In Madrid, on the other hand, the agent is Vlado Lemic and the intermediary Giuseppe Riso who keeps alive the contacts with Inter during these hours of waiting for the meeting with Perez.

Because this is also part of the Florentino Perez strategy: the meeting with Luka Modric was not there, on the day of the return of the Croat in Madrid for training it was Florentino to postpone the face to face with his protégé: return later for the president from the US tour and nothing in fact. And then the right day can be Friday, Perez permitting as it is not new to program changes.

Because waiting and passing days aims to soften the position of Modric, take time is the idea of ​​Real Madrid. With the hope of reassembling the rift with Luka. Because the Croatian wants to go away: clear ideas, he asked to be freed for Inter even during the face to face with José Angel Sanchez in Valdebebas, after today's training with his agents waiting for the parts of the luxurious Moraleja. Real was still stiff, he wants to keep Luka but there is a gentleman agreement at stake.

That's why the meeting with Florentino will be the really decisive one, Inter will wait and hope in that pact between Modric and Perez. It will be up to the player to force to bring down the blank wall that today resists but with some crack ... so that the Madrid leadership has informed about the possible heir of the Croatian, Eriksen and Thiago Alcantara are two good ideas. And Friday can be the right time because Perez's Thursday is dedicated to the Courtois day. Ball to Luka, Real resists and takes time, Inter is ready and quiver for days but everything passes from Perez: for Modric is the weekend from inside or outside.

Luciano Spalletti warned Lautaro Martinez that there’s more to playing for Inter than scoring goals after a stunner beat Atletico Madrid.

The Nerazzurri completed the International Champions Cup tournament with a 1-0 victory away to Atletico Madrid on Saturday evening, decided by Lautaro’s acrobatic volley.

“You are interested in those who score goals, but he also has to be good at combining with his teammates, otherwise the goal isn’t worth much,” the Coach told Sky Sport Italia.

“Lautaro lost the ball too many times and if the defence doesn’t plug the gaps… The fans want to see a team that plays well from start to finish. They care little about seeing one moment that grabs the headlines.

“In the first half, we saw an excellent Inter. In the second half, it was a team that really needs to improve. Atleti introduced players who in a tenth of a second understand if they need to go forward or pass it back. They can read between the lines and are capable of sucking defenders out of position.

“They are really strong and everyone knows the mentality that Diego Simeone can instil in his side, but we have to do more. If we give away the ball in ridiculous situations, if when the determination steps up then some lower the tempo, there’s going to be a problem.”

Spalletti was asked if he’d like to return to the Wanda Metropolitano stadium in June, when it’ll host the 2018-19 Champions League Final.

“Yes, we’ll win the Scudetto and reach the Champions League Final, is that what you wanted me to say?”

Barcelona director Ariedo Braida expects Rafinha to stay

The Brazil international featured 17 times in the league for the Nerazzurri from January onwards as they claimed a Champions League berth.

Inter had the option to purchase Rafinha on a permanent deal this summer, but Luciano Spalletti has instead decided to look elsewhere.

Barca chief Braida hopes that the 25-year-old can now push on from his half-season loan at San Siro.

"Rafinha, very likely, will stay at Barca," he told Radio Sportiva. "He is a boy of great footballing ability and is a player who can decide games because of his handling of the ball. He has the conditions to go far, if he wants to.

"Last year he came from a serious injury, but when he recovered he did great things at Inter. He is a player who has impressive technical abilities. He's a very interesting player who is very good at Barca."

Rafinha lasted just 45 minutes for Barcelona in Sunday's Spanish Supercopa triumph against Sevilla.

The Vice-president of La Liga outfit Real Betis, Llorenç Serra Ferrer, has confirmed the club’s interest in Inter’s Portuguese international midfielder Joao Mario.

Ferrer was asked about Joao Mario as well as Brazilian Lucas Moura who has also been linked with the club, during the presentation of new defender Sidnei da Silva to which he replied very clearly: “They are both two great players and if there is a possibility we would very much like to sign them.”

However Ferrer continued by underlining that a deal is far from done in either case saying: “But we must remain realistic and know what we can do. We are looking to distribute our financial potential in a good way in order to strengthen the squad. We have signed six players, replacing players who did really well last season and we thing we have improved.

“It will be difficult to repeat what we did last year. We are satisfied, we always want to improve but we will not disturb our plan for the club’s future growth in order to sign one or two players” Ferrer concluded.

Inter have reportedly told Joao Mario to accept a transfer or be frozen out of the squad for the next six months.

The Portugal international returned from a loan spell at West Ham United, but has no place within the Nerazzurri and himself confessed he isn’t suited to Italian football.

There has been interest from the likes of Sevilla and Real Betis, but the €30m price-tag is putting some sides off.

According to ItaSportPress, Inter have told Joao Mario he must accept one of the proposals put forward this summer.

If he doesn’t, then he’ll be frozen out of the squad for at least six months until the January transfer window opens.

The Italian transfer summer session shuts on Friday at 19.00 UK time (18.00 GMT).

不過乜資都好，只希望國米好，出事都唔好連累國米
